wordplay_note: Iron free-mountain — a strongman posing as liberator
card_description: Ferris F. Fremont (meaning "Ferris = iron; Fremont = free mountain") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Radio Free Albemuth*. President of the United States who is secretly an agent of a foreign Communist conspiracy. Name note: Iron free-mountain — a strongman posing as liberator. Nixon as cosmic antagonist — the political tyrant serving the Black Iron Prison. First appears in *Radio Free Albemuth*.

reference.brief: President of the United States who is secretly an agent of a foreign Communist conspiracy
reference.significance: Nixon as cosmic antagonist — the political tyrant serving the Black Iron Prison
